title: Enable Anthropic Messages video upload for compatible endpoints (MiniMax M3)
forbidden_changes: Auto-enabling video for anthropic_messages without an explicit checkbox opt-in
Removing or weakening the OpenAI-style video_url block path
Sending Authorization alongside x-api-key for Anthropic providers
Raising any existing per-provider size cap
Weakening request body size, JSON depth, or parsed node limits
deliverables: Anthropic-style base64 video content block in compile/client.rs build_video_request_body
Anthropic auth headers (x-api-key + anthropic-version) in compile/client.rs apply_provider_auth
64 MB per-request size cap for Anthropic providers
ProviderFormDialog updated: anthropic_messages marked supported, hint and warning copy revised, video checkbox enabled
Rust unit tests for Anthropic video body shape, headers, oversize rejection, and messages URL
Task completion report with manual MiniMax M3 smoke test result
acceptance_tests: anthropic_video_request_sets_x_api_key_header asserts x-api-key and anthropic-version headers are present and Authorization is absent
anthropic_video_request_rejects_oversized_payload asserts a request body above 64 MB is rejected before transport
anthropic_video_request_resolves_messages_url asserts the POST URL is <base_url>/messages for Anthropic providers
ProviderFormDialog shows anthropic_messages as supported and the video checkbox is enabled when the type is selected
OpenAI-compatible, Xiaomi MiMo, Google Gemini, and OpenAI Responses compile paths remain unchanged
Manual MiniMax M3 smoke test with a small local MP4 returns a non-error response or a documented vendor error
security_requirements: Anthropic auth headers are gated on provider_kind == Anthropic and never leak to non-Anthropic providers
Per-provider request body size cap is enforced before any network IO
Provider credentials are not written to logs or task snapshots
